tagline: Because the record must not forget.
landing_lead: A civic-accountability record of publicly reported sexual-assault cases across India, compiled from public judicial records and credible media.
recent_lead: The latest published cases across all states, newest first. Each links to its full record and cited sources.
recent_empty: No recent cases to show yet. New cases appear here as they are published, each cited to its public source.
verified_hint: Independently re-checked against its cited source by a second AI review.
updated_hint: When this record was last processed by the pipeline.
explore_lead: Filter by state, status, year and more. Every view is a shareable link.
no_results_hint: Try clearing a filter or widening the year.
genesis_text: No cases have been published yet. Sakshi is live and awaiting its first daily update — published cases will appear here, each cited to its public source.
select_state: Select a state to see its cases.
severity_hint: Severity is derived from the public charge sections — it describes the offence, not any person.
scale_this_week: cases entered the record this week
scale_cumulative: cases on the record in total
scale_heat_label: Daily intake over the recent window.
jur_lead: How each district's cases are moving — sortable. The longer the pendency, the longer justice waits.
offenders_lead: Names appear only from official court records, never from media. Every accused is presumed innocent; acquittals and quashals are shown with equal prominence.
offenders_empty: No court-recorded offenders yet — names appear only from official court records.
accused_withheld: Withheld (media-sourced, not yet in court record)
presumption_banner: An accused person is presumed innocent until proven guilty. Status shown reflects public court records as of the last update.
disclaimer: Sakshi is a civic-accountability record of publicly reported cases, compiled from public judicial records and credible media. It is not a substitute for official crime statistics such as NCRB data; reporting rates vary across regions and time.
error_generic: Something went wrong loading this view.
offline_notice: You appear to be offline. Showing the last saved overview.
stale_notice: This overview may be out of date (last generated over 48 hours ago).
missing_shard: No published data for this state yet.
